title: cordia fallax
intro: Cordia fallax, also known as the wild tea or fallax, is a flowering plant native to South America, particularly in the tropical regions of Brazil and Argentina. Its leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine, which has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia fallax include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cordia fallax can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
